meaning: n.旗,军舰旗,军旗,徽章,<美>海军少尉,
examples: He had been a naval ensign stationed off Cuba.
A flag, banner, or ensign, especially.
The ensign of a chief of state, nation, or city.
Ensign resigned last year after facing allegations of ethics violations related to a sex scandal.
Ensign Tanner Stiehl told The Associated Press the collision occurred at about 6 p.m.
